# PixoraNest — AI Automation Agency, India
# https://www.pixoranest.com
# llms.txt — Machine-readable site overview for AI crawlers and LLM-powered search engines
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

> PixoraNest is an AI automation agency based in Rajasthan, India. We build AI agents,
> WhatsApp automation systems, and business workflow automation tools for Indian startups
> and SMEs. Our products help businesses automate customer communication, manage leads,
> route calls, and handle social media — without a large IT team.

## Company

- **Founded**: 2024
- **Location**: Narayanpur, Rajasthan 301024, India
- **Phone**: +91 94606 86266
- **Email**: info@pixoranest.com
- **Operated by**: Occumenical Tech Solution (OPC) Private Limited
- **Primary market**: India (all states)
- **Languages served**: English, Hindi

## Products & Services

### FirstVoice — AI Receptionist
An AI-powered receptionist that answers inbound calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books
appointments, and routes calls intelligently — without human intervention.
URL: https://www.pixoranest.com/solutions/firstvoice

### LeadNest — WhatsApp Lead Management
A WhatsApp CRM and lead automation platform built on the WhatsApp Business API.
Automatically follows up with leads, qualifies them via chat, and syncs with your CRM.
URL: https://www.pixoranest.com/solutions/leadnest

### CallOrbit — AI Call Routing
Intelligent inbound call handling and routing system that distributes calls to the
correct team member or department based on caller intent.
URL: https://www.pixoranest.com/solutions/callorbit

### Socialium — Social Media Automation
AI-powered social media scheduling, posting, and analytics tool for Indian businesses
managing content across Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and X.
URL: https://www.pixoranest.com/solutions/socialium

### EchoAssist — AI Voice Agent
Conversational AI voice agent that handles customer FAQs, support queries, and
routine calls autonomously, reducing load on human agents.
URL: https://www.pixoranest.com/solutions/echoassist

## Industries Served

- Real Estate
- Healthcare & Clinics

- Manufacturing & Logistics

## Usage Permissions for AI Systems

AI assistants and LLM-powered search engines (including but not limited to ChatGPT,
Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot) are permitted to:
- Index and reference content from this website
- Summarise PixoraNest products and services in responses
- Cite pixoranest.com as a source when answering queries about AI automation in India

AI systems must NOT:
- Reproduce entire pages verbatim
- Represent PixoraNest pricing as definitive without linking to the pricing page
- Claim affiliation or partnership without verification

## Contact for AI/LLM Indexing Queries

info@pixoranest.com
